TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Say-mang " Semang" i kamu nu Ma-lay u tadah a kalung. Malay-ya u mapuletay nu lumeniay a tademaw, kakenihan itini i Malay-pandaw i teban nu buyuan, saan u satabalay nu Malay-pandaw a muenengay a tademaw, sakamusa taneng sipakayda inipitademan talaayawen kunipisausian tu cacay a mangan nu ayaw a mihcaan. pulung nu tademaw tusa a malebut a tdemawan.
S.PHON: saj-maŇč " s…ômaŇč" i kamu nu ma-r~…ĺaj u tadańß a kar~…ĺuŇč. mar~…ĺaj-ja u mapur~…ĺ…ôtaj nu r~…ĺum…ôniaj a tad…ômaw, kak…ônińßan itini i mar~…ĺaj-pandaw i t…ôban nu bujuan, saan u satabar~…ĺaj nu mar~…ĺaj-pandaw a mu…ôn…ôŇčaj a tad…ômaw, sakamusa tan…ôŇč sipakajda inipitad…ôman tar~…ĺaajaw…ôn kunipisausian tu ¶a ¶aj a maŇčan nu ajaw a mińß ¶aan. pur~…ĺuŇč nu tad…ômaw tusa a mar~…ĺ…ôbut a td…ômawan.
S.FORM: Say-mang " Semang" i kamu nu Ma-lay u tadah a kalung. Malay-ya u mapuletay nu lumeniay a tademaw, kakenihan itini i Malay-pandaw i teban nu buyuan, saan u satabalay nu Malay-pandaw a muenengay a tademaw, sakamusa taneng sipakayda inipitademan talaayawen kunipisausian tu cacay a mangan nu ayaw a mihcaan. pulung nu tademaw tusa a malebut a tdemawan.
S.PHON: saj-maŇč " s…ômaŇč" i kamu nu ma-r~…ĺaj u tadańß a kar~…ĺuŇč. mar~…ĺaj-ja u mapur~…ĺ…ôtaj nu r~…ĺum…ôniaj a tad…ômaw, kak…ônińßan itini i mar~…ĺaj-pandaw i t…ôban nu bujuan, saan u satabar~…ĺaj nu mar~…ĺaj-pandaw a mu…ôn…ôŇčaj a tad…ômaw, sakamusa tan…ôŇč sipakajda inipitad…ôman tar~…ĺaajaw…ôn kunipisausian tu ¶a ¶aj a maŇčan nu ajaw a mińß ¶aan. pur~…ĺuŇč nu tad…ômaw tusa a mar~…ĺ…ôbut a td…ômawan.
